inputs.prompt: Project: Signal Lost — a 90-minute documentary about rural communities in the American Midwest that lost all local news coverage when their newspapers closed. Format: Feature documentary. Award: International Documentary Association Best Feature. Key achievement: First documentary to map the correlation between news deserts and voter turnout decline using original research. Impact: 180,000 views on streaming, cited in a congressional briefing on local journalism funding. Challenges: Filming across 12 communities over 18 months with a crew of three.
Project: podcast series about sleep science. Award: Best Science Podcast, Audio Academy Awards. Key achievement: Most downloaded science podcast episode of 2025. Word limit: 300 words.

Project: The Crossing — a 3-part audio documentary following refugees crossing the Mediterranean, told entirely through phone recordings and voice messages sent to family members. Format: 3 x 30 min audio documentary. Award: Prix Europa, Best Audio Documentary. Key achievement: First documentary built entirely from participant-recorded phone audio. Impact: 420,000 downloads. Adopted by UNHCR for internal training. Production challenge: Ethical handling of recordings made in life-threatening circumstances. Word limit: 400 words.
